steps.title: Use the contrast goal
steps.content: The student wants to contrast how igneous rock at the two parks formed. The notes say Acadia has intrusive rock, formed when molten rock cools within Earth's crust, while Crater Lake has extrusive rock, formed after molten rock exits the crust.

steps.title: Include both formations
steps.content: A mentions only Acadia and the general rock type. C states a similarity rather than a contrast. D defines the rock types generally without naming the parks. The best choice contrasts both parks and both formation processes. The answer is B.
